mapper.insert: INSERT INTO media_asset ( storage_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, width, height, checksum ) VALUES ( #{storageKey}, #{originalFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{checksum} )

INSERT INTO media_attachment ( media_asset_id, owner_type, owner_id, attachment_role, sort_order, is_cover ) VALUES ( #{mediaAssetId}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{attachmentRole}, #{sortOrder}, #{isCover} )
